name: Pickens Savings And Loan Association, Fa
description_short: Pickens Savings & Loan is a community-focused hometown bank in South Carolina offering checking, savings, mortgages, and mobile banking services with local decision-making.
description_long:
Pickens Savings & Loan Association operates as a full-service community bank headquartered in Pickens, South Carolina, with a second branch in Six Mile. The institution positions itself as a hometown bank committed to making decisions locally with community interests in mind, emphasizing trust and personalized service in the financial products it offers.

The bank provides a comprehensive suite of consumer banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, mortgage loans, mobile deposit, and online banking services. They offer digital tools such as CardValet for mobile card control, Notifi account alerts, eStatements, and 24-hour telephone banking via a toll-free number. Their physical presence includes two branch locations with extended hours on Friday and limited Wednesday service at the main branch.

Pickens Savings & Loan distinguishes itself through local ownership and decision-making, contrasting with larger regional or national banks. The institution emphasizes convenience with mobile banking that allows customers to bank "anywhere, any time" and promotes the tagline "Less time at the bank. More time at the lake," reflecting its regional South Carolina identity and lifestyle focus.

As a community savings and loan association, Pickens operates with limited geographic reach (two branches in Pickens County, SC) and a narrower product range compared to larger financial institutions. Customers seeking investment products, business banking services, or specialized lending beyond mortgages may need to look elsewhere. The bank's strength lies in serving local customers who value community relationships and straightforward banking products rather than comprehensive financial services. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Checking accounts with flexibility and convenience features
Savings accounts tailored to different financial goals
Mortgage loans for home purchase and financing
Online banking with secure login and account management
Mobile banking app for smartphone access
Mobile deposit for remote check deposits
CardValet mobile app for card control and spending management
Notifi account alerts for account activity notifications
Secure contact form for sensitive communications
pros: Local decision-making and community focus, avoiding decisions made by distant corporate entities
Two convenient branch locations with extended Friday hours (5:30pm closing) for working customers
Mobile banking app allowing customers to bank from anywhere at any time
Mobile deposit feature enabling check deposits without visiting a branch
24-hour telephone banking via toll-free number (800) 414-4071 for account access
CardValet mobile app providing real-time card control and spending management
Notifi account alerts that notify customers immediately of important account activity
eStatements option for paperless, secure statement delivery
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only two branches, restricting accessibility for non-local customers
Reduced lobby hours on Wednesday (8:30am-1:30pm) at main branch may be inconvenient for some customers
No information provided about deposit insurance, interest rates, or fee structures on their website
Limited product offerings compared to larger banks—no mention of investment services, business banking, or credit cards
Smaller institution may have fewer ATM locations and less robust technology infrastructure than national banks

contact.address: 205 E Cedar Rock St, Pickens, SC 29671

best_for: Pickens County, South Carolina residents seeking a community bank with local decision-makers
Customers who value personal relationships and hometown service over corporate banking
People in the Pickens or Six Mile areas looking for basic checking, savings, and mortgage products
Homebuyers in the region seeking mortgage lending from a locally-focused lender
diagnosis: Pickens Savings & Loan is best for customers in Pickens County, South Carolina, who prioritize community banking relationships, straightforward products, and local decision-making. The main caveat is limited geographic reach (two branches only) and a basic product suite—customers needing investment services, business banking, or broader national access should consider larger institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 205 E Cedar Rock St, Pickens, SC 29671
